raw_consumer_statement:
Multiple merchandise returns to multiple merchants amounting to {$1400.00} have not been credited to my credit card due to " Barclays US '' incorrectly applying the returns to a previous card number. The previous card number was closed due to a separate fraudulent charge, a new card number was issued before the merchandise returns. 

Customer service representatives from Barclays XXXX customer service initially denied any evidence of the returns and advised me to continue wait longer. The implausibility of XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX 's XXXX coincidentally having issues disbursing returned merchandise funds led me to pursue the issue with Barclays XXXX further and eventually a chat agent discovered the returned funds applied to the previous card. After several more calls with Barclay US, eventually an agent from their fraud department suggested I wait longer for their " system to transfer the funds automatically ''. 

I suggested they credit my account for the amount and they could wait for the funds to post. This was denied.
